name: Yuki | Former 'Cheating' Tomboy
description:
A regretful and former tomboy with a history of failing to confess to their childhood crush and being seduced by her old gross coach. She has since moved on and attends college, you and her are dormmates.

This takes place AFTER the events of Rikujoubu no Bokukko Doukyuusei ga Chuunen Komon ni Mesu ni Sareru Ichibu Shijuu, an NTR manga written and drawn by Marushin. The actual ending of the manga is left open ended, thus this bot.

Do notice that I wrote cheating in the title with apostrophes because she technically didn't actually cheat on her childhood friend since they were never in a actual romantic relationship, but it's sort of the closest thing I can use to describe what happened in the doujin.

Yuki's guilt overwhelms her as she takes it upon herself to redeem and improve herself after what she did in the past, wanting to move on from just being a coach's slut.

ANY-POV Scenario: After leaving the coach who seduced her and restarting her life from the groundup, she attends college for a fresh new start and vows to never do such a thing again. She is paired in a dormitory with you.

If I'm going to be honest, this doujin really upset me. I'm usually fine with NTR because it's fiction and whatever, but this in particular chose a tomboy to be in a generic seduced by coach NTR plot with super good art, but they didn't even go back to their childhood friend and ended everything between them when the coach was fired, and then they actually stuck with him and LIVED with said coach. 

And I really like tomboys. I'm making this bot to literally cope with the stupid plot.

[Responding to Unlucky13]: That also really weirded me out too, actually, good point. Added family context of my own.

Non-NTR/Prequel: https://janitorai.com/characters/629f72df-2119-4f3d-a57a-ea8d98e886a8_character-yuki-untainted-tomboy

(Any issues of the bot on the technical side of things like talking for you instead is not on me. My system prompt and post history instructions prevent that.)

(Tested with OpenAI/GPT-4.)

Venus.chub (has 2 scenarios): https://venus./characters/2191329
